A

abraxisFilePathList - Static variable in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
A list of kernel file paths used by Abraxis subsystem to verify kernel integrity
abraxisLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic of the Abraxis sub-system to check if kernel programs are verified and can be booted without issues.
AccountCreate - Class in Cataphract.API.Dragon
A class to create new user accounts on the system.
AccountCreate() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
 
accountCreateLogic(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
Logic that will help in creating a new user in Cataphract
AccountDelete - Class in Cataphract.API.Dragon
A class to delete user accounts on the system.
AccountDelete(String) - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountDelete
Constructor for AccountDelete class.
accountDeletionLogic(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountDelete
Logic for account deletion.
accountManagementMenu() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to display and manage account modification menu
accountManagementMenuDisplay() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to display the account management menu
AccountModify - Class in Cataphract.API.Dragon
A class to modify user accounts on the system.
AccountModify(String) - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Constructor to store details about the current user to global variables
accountModifyLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to execute account modification logic
accountPromoteDemoteLogic(String, String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
 
addAccountToDatabase() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
 
administratorSession() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountDelete
Administrator session for account deletion.

A class that provides a set of built in commands for all classes.

Sole constructor.
anvilInterpreter(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Anvil
Module implementing the interpreter for common commands.
authenticateCurrentUser() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
 
authenticationLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.PolicyManager
Logic to authenticate a user to access the policy management system
authenticationLogic(String, String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login

B

Build - Class in Cataphract.API
A class to display the build information and clear the screen.
Build() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Build
 

C

Calendar - Class in Cataphract.API.Astaroth
A class that provides calendar utility for printing calendars.
Calendar() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Astaroth.Calendar
 
Cataphract.API - package Cataphract.API
The API package contains all essential programs that helps in the functioning of Cataphract correctly.
Cataphract.API.Astaroth - package Cataphract.API.Astaroth
 
Cataphract.API.Dragon - package Cataphract.API.Dragon
The Dragon packge contains all essential utilities to manage user accounts.
Cataphract.API.Minotaur - package Cataphract.API.Minotaur
The Minotaur package contains tools relating to policy management and cryptography for checking hashes for files and literals.
Cataphract.API.Wraith - package Cataphract.API.Wraith
 
Cataphract.API.Wraith.Archive - package Cataphract.API.Wraith.Archive
 
Cataphract.API.Wyvern - package Cataphract.API.Wyvern
 
Cataphract.Core - package Cataphract.Core
The Core package contains the essential kernel files for the kernel to boot and function correctly.
changeAccountName() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to change account name
changeAccountPassword() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to change account password
changeAccountPIN() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to change account PIN
changeAccountSecurityKey() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to change account security key
checkFileHashes() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to check the file hashes against the M1 manifest hashes.
checkFileSizes() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to check the file sizes against the Manifest M2 sizes
checkFileValidity() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Wraith.FileRead
Checks the validity of the file name.
checkFileValidity(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Wraith.FileWrite
Checks the validity of a file name.
checkForExistingAccount() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login
Method to check for an existing user account in the database.
checkPrivilegeLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login
Method to check user privileges.
checkUserExistence() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login
Method to check if the user account exists.
clearScreen() - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Build
Logic to clear the terminal screen.
commitChangesToDatabase(String, String, String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to commit changes to the database

Provide a method that will ask the user to press the RETURN key.
confirmReturnToContinue(String, String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams

Logic to convert from an OS dependent file separator format of file paths to Nion File Separator format.

F

FATAL_ERROR_EXIT - Static variable in class Main
A critical information notifying the user that the kernel exited fatally.
FATAL_ERROR_RESTART - Static variable in class Main
A critical information notifying the user that the kernel is restarting after exiting fatally.

KERNEL_FOUND - Static variable in class Main

KERNEL_NOT_FOUND - Static variable in class Main

printInfo(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams

printWarning(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams

_accountUsernamePolicy - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate

_BuildInfo - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Build
An array that holds the values for Kernel Name, version, build date, build ID and the kernel branch/build type.

_textColorForeground - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams

_username - Variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login
